  "findings": [
    "PPE ratings and markings are not visible or verifiable on the staged equipment",
    "Staged PPE cannot be confirmed to match the engineered drawings and specifications"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt work progression until PPE is unboxed or turned to expose rating labels",
    "Verify all PPE ratings, sizes, and classes against the engineered drawings and safety permits before issuing to workers"
  ],
  "rationale": "PPE must be clearly marked and verified to meet the specific class and size requirements of the engineered drawings and safety permits prior to starting work. Staging PPE with ratings hidden prevents mandatory pre-work verification, posing a high safety risk.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.132",
    "NFPA 70E Article 130"
  ]
